summary: 0.6.43 fixes the CUA joystick video scrub seam so it uses the same 15-second transport base as the shared skip path instead of keeping the older normalized scrub rate.
operatorSignals: The shared skip seam had moved to 15 seconds, but the joystick scrub still felt like roughly 90 seconds on long videos.
That mismatch made it clear the CUA input path still had its own older scrub-rate policy.
actionsTaken: Changed the CUA joystick video scrub calculation to derive normalized movement from the shared 15-second transport step.
nonGoals: No slideshow or right-stick volume changes.
